config.css: * { box-sizing: border-box; font-family: system-ui; } .controls { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; max-width: 600px; } .row { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; } label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; flex: 1; min-width: 200px; } select, input[type=range] { width: 100%; padding: 6px; } button { padding: 10px 24px; background: #2563eb; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } button.running { background: #dc2626; } .log { margin-top: 16px; max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; font-family: monospace; font-size: 12px; background: #1e1e1e; color: #0f0; padding: 8px; border-radius: 6px; } #status { font-weight: 600; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 4px; } #counter { color: #666; font-size: 12px; }
